Fields.Name: Activate Chr by Time - Phantom ID
Fields.Description: Phantom shader ID used for directing the appearance and disappearance of enemies placed in a specific time zone

Fields.Name: Find Unfavourable Failed Point Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to generate an interrupt, which turns out that the enemy is likely to be cut off when going to the end of the path

Fields.Name: Find Unfavourable Failed Point Height
Fields.Description: The height that causes an interrupt, which turns out that the enemy is likely to be cut off when going to the end of the path
